creator: nimaje+fbz@bureaucracy.de
text:
As you didn't specify, I guess you use 14.2-RELEASE and are hitting the problem that the pkg repos are build on 14.1-RELEASE and some kernel modules (like drm-kmod and vbox) are using some ABIs that aren't stable between minor versions.

The errata page https://www.freebsd.org/releases/14.2R/errata/#open-issues also notes that you can't use the official repos for drm-kmod on 14.2 currently (until 14.1 EOL).
